name: Moonshot AI (Kimi)
description: Kimi Chat API with 256K context window and trillion-parameter K2 model. OpenAI-compatible API for long-context conversations, code generation, and intelligent dialogue.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Moonshot AI's Kimi (月之暗面) provides a trillion-parameter K2 large language model with industry-leading 256K context window. Features instant and thinking modes, multimodal capabilities (vision), and professional code generation. OpenAI-compatible API makes integration seamless. **Note:** Requires API key from [Moonshot AI Platform](https://platform.moonshot.cn/).

Authorization.description: Bearer token for Moonshot AI API authentication

tools.name: Create Chat Completion
tools.description: Generate conversational responses using Kimi models

messages.description: Array of message objects with 'role' (system/user/assistant) and 'content' fields

stream.description: Whether to stream partial message deltas

stop.description: Up to 4 sequences where API will stop generating

tool_choice.description: Control tool calling: 'none', 'auto', or specific tool

tools.name: List Available Models
tools.description: Get list of all available Kimi models

tools.name: Get Model Details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific model

tools.name: Get Token Count
tools.description: Estimate token count for given messages
